subcodes.first_line: Thy faith and certitude are firmly established, and thy hope and knowledge bear witness. And there spoke a believing man from among the people of Pharaoh who concealed his faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایمان و ایقانت مسلم و اقبال و عرفانت مصدق و قال رجل مومن من آل فرعون یکتم
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @dissimulation [taqiyyih]; concealment or denial of Faith, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
